use_cases: Audio volume control in media players and streaming applications
Settings panels for adjusting playback preferences in SaaS platforms
Video player controls for content streaming services
Game audio settings in gaming applications
Smart device volume controls for IoT dashboards
ai_summary: A volume slider component built with framer-motion that enables users to adjust volume levels through drag interactions or direct track clicks. Features smooth motion animations, real-time position-to-value conversion, and responsive design suitable for media players, settings panels, and audio controls across web and mobile applications.
